title: psychotria singapurensis
intro: Psychotria singapurensis, also known as Singapore queen, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Psychotria singapurensis include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and providing anti-cancer properties, among others. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
